purpose: Freeze the shared run, candidate, dataset, label and validation contracts for the closed-loop system: data generation -> model learning -> optimization validation -> failure fallback -> data update.

scope.first_constraint: tool1 y+ aligned to world z-
core_dependency_boundary: level_planner_core may depend on CuRobo, torch, local config and local asset loaders.
level_planner_core must not depend on ROS, RViz, motion state machines, external_comm, hardware drivers or product-specific task orchestration.
Large datasets, run bundles and checkpoints stay under /pub/data/caohy/levelConstrainedPlanning.

storage_policy.trajectory_storage_rule: Planner result JSON may keep selected trajectory for compatibility. Candidate datasets should keep small trajectories inline, and may store large full-resolution trajectories by artifact_path plus sha256.

versioning.compatibility_rule: Existing result.json fields remain readable; new closed-loop fields are additive.

PlannerRunRecord.description: One online or offline planning request execution. It is the parent object for all candidates, fallback attempts and exportable dataset samples.

required_fields.run_id: Stable unique id for the execution, preferably request_id plus timestamp or uuid.
required_fields.request_id: User or batch supplied request id.
required_fields.request: Original request payload after JSON-safe normalization.
required_fields.normalized_request: Planner-normalized request used by core, including start_joint, target_pose, alignment and seed_policy.
required_fields.world_summary: Obstacle/world summary from level_planner_core.world, including box counts and source paths when available.
required_fields.seed_policy: Effective seed policy after defaults and runtime downgrades.
required_fields.seed_provider_reports: List of provider-level reports for planner_native, rule_seed, diffusion_seed and critic when enabled.
required_fields.candidates: CandidateRecord list or artifact reference to candidates.jsonl.
required_fields.fallback_trace: Ordered stages showing learned-first attempts, failure causes and rule/native fallback recovery.
required_fields.failure_reason: Final failure reason when result_status is not success.
required_fields.selected_candidate_id: Candidate id chosen as final trajectory, or null.
required_fields.metrics: Run-level metrics and selected-candidate metric summaries.
required_fields.timings: Wall time by seed generation, repair, validation, selection, fallback and total.
required_fields.artifacts: Paths to result.json, lifecycle.json, candidate_summary.json, candidates.jsonl and trajectory files.

optional_fields.planner_version: Git commit, package version or local build id.
optional_fields.environment: CuRobo, CUDA, torch, python, GPU and device info.
optional_fields.artifact_pointer: artifacts/current_artifacts.json snapshot or hash used by learned providers.
optional_fields.dataset_export: Export status after this run is converted into candidate samples.

CandidateRecord.description: One seed or optimized trajectory candidate. Every planner-native, rule, diffusion, critic-selected and fallback candidate should be represented with the same lifecycle fields.

required_fields.trajectory: Raw seed trajectory, repaired trajectory, selected trajectory or artifact reference.
required_fields.precheck: Cheap shape/start/step/joint-absolute checks before repair pool admission.
required_fields.optimizer_result: CuRobo repair or native planner status, timing and returned trajectory summary.
required_fields.validator_metrics: Hard validation metrics using the frozen metric set.
required_fields.labels: Training and audit labels derived from lifecycle and validation.
required_fields.failure_stage: First failed stage, or null on success.
required_fields.failure_reason: Machine-readable failure reason, or null on success.

fields.points: Inline list[list[float]] for small or training samples.
fields.artifact_path: Optional path when trajectory is too large for inline JSONL.
fields.sha256: Optional hash for external trajectory artifact.

lifecycle.generated: Candidate was produced by a provider or native planner.
lifecycle.entered_pool: Candidate was admitted into the repair/selection pool.
lifecycle.repair_attempted: CuRobo native planning or trajopt repair was executed.
lifecycle.repair_success: Optimizer returned at least one usable trajectory.
lifecycle.fallback_recovered: This candidate succeeded after an earlier learned or primary path failed.

DatasetSampleRecord.description: Flat JSONL row consumed by diffusion and Success Critic training.

required_fields.task: Robot, tool frame, target pose, alignment and obstacle summary.
required_fields.start_state: service_start_joint and optional normalized start fields.
required_fields.obstacle_world: World summary suitable for conditioning and audit.
required_fields.candidate: CandidateRecord-derived compact candidate object with trajectory.points or artifact_path.

compatibility_notes: TrajectorySeedDataset currently requires sample_type == candidate and candidate.trajectory.points.
SuccessCriticDataset currently requires sample_type == candidate and candidate.trajectory.points.
Exporter may also emit request_failure samples later, but they are not diffusion positives.

true_when: trajectory points are present and finite
candidate is repair_success or planner_native success
trajectory satisfies alignment, goal, continuity, joint limit and available collision checks
false_when: candidate is only a request_failure sample
candidate is shadow-only and never repaired unless explicitly marked usable_by_shadow_validation
positive_for_diffusion.training_use: Diffusion maximum-likelihood training uses positive_for_diffusion rows only.

true_when: candidate is selected or accepted as a success under the fixed budget policy
candidate was rejected by pool precheck
candidate was valid but not selected when policy needs ranking negatives
negative_for_critic.training_use: Success classifier negative target and regression risk supervision.

true_when: a learned-first or primary path failed before the selected fallback candidate succeeded
fallback_recovered.training_use: Measures data generation and online recovery value.

true_when: all required hard validation metrics pass
false_when: any required metric fails or is missing

collision_safety.missing_policy: unchecked is allowed during early standalone phases but must be recorded as collision_unchecked, not silently omitted.

velocity_acceleration.missing_policy: optional until trajectory timing is exported; missing values must be recorded as not_available.

per_run_files.lifecycle.json: PlannerRunRecord without large external trajectory payloads when necessary.
per_run_files.trajectories/: Optional external trajectory payloads keyed by candidate id.

dataset_files.manifest.json: Dataset version, source bundles, counts, hashes and label distribution.

migration_impact.phase_1: Implement dataclasses/export helpers that produce PlannerRunRecord and CandidateRecord while preserving existing result.json.
migration_impact.phase_2: Validator must fill hard_validation_metric_contract fields before labels are derived.
migration_impact.phase_4: Repair adapter must populate optimizer_result and preserve source_lineage for every seed.
migration_impact.phase_7: Dataset exporter must emit sample_type=candidate rows compatible with current diffusion and critic loaders.
migration_impact.phase_8: Training scripts may upgrade loaders but must keep this contract as the source of truth.
